home.desc: Frontend and full-stack developer specialized in React, Angular, Vue, TypeScript and NestJS. I build modern, performant and user-focused web applications.

githubCard.title: My GitHub Projects
githubCard.desc: Explore all my work, contributions, and experiments directly on my GitHub profile.

items.title: Wedding Experience – Interactive Event Website
items.brief: An immersive wedding event website designed to deliver a modern and elegant digital experience. Developed with a responsive and interactive frontend approach, the project features smooth animations, refined visual transitions, and dynamic user interactions. The interface combines minimalist aesthetics, emotional storytelling, and premium UI/UX design to create a visually engaging and memorable experience.

items.title: Valentine Interactive Landing Page
items.brief: Interactive single-page Valentine experience built with Vue 3. Features playful cursor-aware button animations, immersive full-screen layout, custom background assets, and smooth state-based transitions. Designed as a creative UX experiment combining emotion-driven design and frontend interactivity.

items.title: Alcove Menuiserie
items.brief: Professional showcase website for a custom woodworking and carpentry company based in La Rochelle. Elegant design, modular Vue architecture, reusable UI components, responsive layout, and service-oriented pages with optimized user journey.

items.title: Mami Délice
items.brief: Modern showcase website for an event catering service. Immersive design, smooth navigation, and an optimized call-to-action redirecting users directly to Gmail for quote requests.

items.title: Angular Pro Starter
items.brief: A modern, production-ready Angular starter featuring authentication, guards, unit testing, and Docker + NGINX deployment.

items.title: Roadshine
items.brief: A career orientation platform designed to match user profiles with the right opportunities.

items.title: Fileor
items.brief: A full-featured e-commerce platform built with React, NestJS, and PostgreSQL, deployed on a VPS using Docker and NGINX. Includes product, order, and secure authentication management.

items.title: Running App – Fitness Tracking PWA
items.brief: A progressive web application (PWA) focused on fitness tracking and running experiences, built with Next.js and TypeScript. The project features immersive mobile-first UI, interactive maps, dynamic components and a modern fitness-inspired interface designed for performance, responsiveness and engaging user experience.

items.title: Acorad Academy
items.brief: A responsive showcase website built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind for a digital marketing expert.
